creator: hilko.meyer@gmx.de
text:
Similar to docs/73095:

Some tables are displayed wrong in Opera 9.02 and IE6. The columnwidth in
each column is equal to the longest word in the colummn.

I have seen this in the errata-pages, eg:

http://www.freebsd.org/releases/4.11R/errata.html or
http://www.freebsd.org/releases/5.5R/errata.html

Fix: 

Similar to rev 1.27 in the handbook network-servers-chapter.
Replace
<informaltable frame="none">
with
<informaltable frame="none" pgwide="1">

Or ask ceri. :-)
